{# Override sphinx-book-theme's components/author.html. The theme's default renders "{{ translate('By') }} {{ author }}", and Sphinx's bundled Korean catalog mistranslates "By" as the postposition "으로" (which reads like "using/via " rather than "written by"). We render the correct phrasing explicitly per language instead of relying on that translation. #} {% if author %}

{% if language == 'ko' %} 작성자: {{ author }} {% else %} By {{ author }} {% endif %}

{% endif %}
